35.reason: [The function 'inorder' does not handle the case when root is NULL, leading to a potential segmentation fault when accessing p->left and p->right without checking if p is NULL.]

51.reason: [The insertion logic does not handle the case where item == p->data. According to the problem, right child should be used for values >= root, but this code only inserts to the right when item > p->data, thus ignoring duplicates.]
